test_suites.name: scrape_api_tests
coverage_areas: Metadata extraction (title, description, Open Graph tags)
Error handling (invalid URL, 404, timeout, malformed JSON)
Real URL testing (example.com, GitHub, Python docs)
test_suites.notes: Tests are designed to FAIL initially following TDD methodology. They will pass once rust-scraper implements the /api/v1/scrape endpoint.

metadata.description: Canonical test catalog for essence web retrieval engine and SaaS platform

test_categories.metadata: Metadata extraction tests (title, description, Open Graph)
test_categories.error_handling: Error handling and edge case tests
test_categories.integration: Real URL integration tests (ignored by default)
test_categories.api_key: API key validation and management tests
test_categories.gdpr: GDPR compliance tests (data export, deletion, anonymization)

test_infrastructure.test_database: PostgreSQL with isolated databases per test
utilities: TestDb - Isolated database creation and cleanup
TestUser - Test user creation with subscriptions
